item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is a kick-ass way to present a very simple Foundation story. Original creepypasta flavour, wrapped up in just the right amount of tangential procedural weirdness. Excellent job!

I absolutely love this. I love the mystery and ambiguity surrounding the SCP itself and the interactions between Lowe and Green are very well done, I especially got a chuckle out of "[Agent Lowe extends his middle finger toward Green's back as he walks down the basement stairs.]"

Easy +1, keep up the good work.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I appreciated the dynamic between Lowe and Green, but I didn't find the situation they were involved in very interesting to read, and I don't think enough attention was paid to the mystery pertaining to how the video made it to the database (I don't think I would have been able to figure it out without reading the author post).

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oooh, another collab between you two. That was excellent! I really like all of the natural transitions going from room to room, and the pictures really added to the whole experience. Not to mention that I like the movement of having "Pending" articles. Easy +1 from me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Awesome work my man reminds me of the Ring for some reason +1.

item.title: Author Post 2 - Electric BOOGALOO
item.content:encoded: As always, I truly do enjoy the opportunities to work with DrAkimoto. Your brain is a beautiful fucking thing, my friend.

item.title: File Upload: Source Unknown
item.content:encoded:
Once again it was great to work with MalyceGraves.

spoiler
boop

So, we got Earth B where the video takes place, and Earth A is our normal Foundation. The team in Earth B is sent to survey the church that was messing around with some sort of snake people vodou. During their time there, the Way is opened and the snake chick comes to Earth B and the dude is taken taken through the Way. What isn't in the article is that the Way led to Earth A and that's where the vodou snake people monsters are from. When the dude was brought through the Way his camera automatically connected to Earth A's SCiPNet and uploaded all its data. That's why the log ends when the way closes, the connection to Earth A's SCiPNet was lost.
